summary: Re-verified migration 007_b9_demo_seed.sql after main agent trimmed the bcrypt-shaped placeholder from 65 to 60 chars. Updated EXPECTED_PLACEHOLDER in the pytest file to the new 60-char value and re-ran the full 35-test suite. All 35 tests pass, including the previously-failing placeholder-length assertion. File-level verification only (no live Supabase access).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Migration 007_b9_demo_seed.sql is now file-level clean. Placeholder is exactly 60 chars: `$2a$10$DemoAccountNoLoginXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX` (header `$2a$10$` 7 chars + body 53 chars). All 35 checks pass: pgcrypto-removal (3), placeholder shape (4), SQL well-formedness (4), idempotency (10), gen_random_uuid (1), demo-uuid consistency (13), grant (1). Next step is for the user to run the migration in their Supabase SQL editor; no further file-level checks are needed unless the SQL is modified.
